# Quota / metered-credit system

The system manages **wallets**, **budgets**, **meters** that hold a credit balance. An **administrator** grants credit (deposit); members draw it down (withdraw). Calls carry an idempotency `key`.

## Rules
- **Tenant isolation** — records belong to an org; users only see/act within their own org.
- **Positive amounts only** — deposits/withdrawals must be positive.
- **Authorization** — only an admin may grant credit.
- **Conservation** — a balance never goes negative; a withdraw beyond the balance is refused.
- **Exactly once** — a replayed deposit/withdraw key applies once.
